name: langchain-agent-mcp-server
description: A production-ready MCP server that exposes LangChain agent capabilities through the Model Context Protocol. Provides multi-step reasoning with ReAct pattern, tool support (web search, weather lookup), and is deployed on Google Cloud Run for scalable, serverless operation.
